name: Northampton Country Club
about: Northampton Country Club is a semi-private golf facility in Western Massachusetts featuring a 9-hole course and an indoor golf simulator. The club operates as a community hub offering golf, dining, event spaces, and a seasonal pool. It is known for being affordable and has received regional accolades, including the 2024 Course of the Year from the New England Golf Course Owners Association. The venue combines on-course play with indoor technology and event hosting in a welcoming atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor simulator for year-round play and practice
Recognized with regional course awards for quality
Comprehensive amenities including pro shop and dining

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available at the 19th Hole Bar & Grill
Full bar service at the 19th Hole Bar & Grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Brand and model not specified on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website mentions club fitting services but doesn't specify club rental availability. It's recommended to bring your own clubs or inquire directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service 19th Hole Bar & Grill, so outside food and drink policies aren't specified. It's likely that outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility features a 9-hole course, so playing 18 holes would typically take 2-3 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Northampton Country Club is family-friendly, with a welcoming atmosphere and mentions of events that cater to various demographics including families.
